title: Blocage du rating BSCS sur les CDR roaming entrants
description: Depuis 06:20 les CDR roaming entrants ne sont plus valorises dans BSCS et le backlog depasse 42000 enregistrements. Les soldes clients postpayes ne sont plus mis a jour apres consommation. L impact est confirme sur le perimetre production entreprise.
resolution: Le parseur a ete corrige puis le lot corrompu a ete purge et les CDR en attente ont ete rejoues sans perte de donnees
root_cause: Un lot de CDR partenaire contenait un format de date non conforme qui a bloque le parseur de mediation
comments_summary: Les CDR invalides ont ete isoles et la file de mediation secondaire a pris le relais pour les flux prioritaires Le parseur a ete corrige puis le lot corrompu a ete purge et les CDR en attente ont ete rejoues sans perte de donnees Verification finale effectuee avec les equipes metier et exploitation.

title: Echec du bill run mensuel BSCS pour les comptes entreprise
description: Le bill run mensuel s arrete au milieu du cycle entreprise et aucune facture PDF n est produite pour 8600 comptes. Les previsions de cloture financiere sont retardees. Le NOC a ouvert une surveillance renforcee sur le service concerne.
resolution: Le chemin de rendu PDF a ete corrige puis le bill run a ete relance en reprise et toutes les factures ont ete regenerees
root_cause: Le repertoire de polices du moteur PDF etait invalide apres une maintenance systeme
comments_summary: Les factures critiques ont ete sorties via le moteur de secours afin de respecter la fenetre de controle finance Le chemin de rendu PDF a ete corrige puis le bill run a ete relance en reprise et toutes les factures ont ete regenerees Verification finale effectuee avec les equipes metier et exploitation.

title: Desynchronisation des fiches clients CRM Ericsson vers BSCS
description: Les creations de comptes corporate dans le CRM Ericsson ne remontent plus vers BSCS depuis la derniere mise a jour. Les commerciaux valident les dossiers mais aucun compte de facturation n est cree. Le client demande un retour rapide afin de respecter son SLA contractuel.
comments_summary: Investigation en cours. Les comptes urgents ont ete crees manuellement dans BSCS pour les ventes prioritaires Une analyse detaillee des journaux applicatifs et des dependances techniques a ete engagee.

title: Perte de remontee des KPI radio dans Core Network OSS
description: Les tableaux NOC n affichent plus les KPI radio 2G et 4G pour 186 noeuds depuis 01:00. La supervision reseau ne peut plus suivre la disponibilite et la charge trafic en temps reel. Des controles complementaires ont ete lances sur les flux inter applicatifs.
comments_summary: Investigation en cours. Le NOC a bascule temporairement sur les compteurs locaux exposes par les equipements critiques Une analyse detaillee des journaux applicatifs et des dependances techniques a ete engagee.

title: Blocage de la file JMS d activation dans la plateforme de provisioning
description: Les demandes d activation postpayees restent en statut pending depuis 09:10 et plus de 630 ordres sont en attente. Les boutiques et le CRM ne recoivent plus de confirmation technique. Le perimetre touche concerne principalement les comptes B2B prioritaires.
resolution: Le message fautif a ete mis en quarantaine puis le consumer a ete relance et les ordres ont ete rejoues avec succes
root_cause: Un message XML mal forme issu d un canal partenaire a bloque le consommateur principal de la file JMS
comments_summary: Les activations VIP ont ete traitees via un worker secondaire et une verification manuelle des accuses a ete effectuee Le message fautif a ete mis en quarantaine puis le consumer a ete relance et les ordres ont ete rejoues avec succes Verification finale effectuee avec les equipes metier et exploitation.

title: Demandes de portabilite bloquees a la validation operateur donneur
description: Les demandes MNP entrantes restent en attente de validation et aucun accuse n est renvoye par l operateur donneur. Le portail de portabilite accumule rapidement un stock de dossiers. L impact est confirme sur le perimetre production entreprise.
resolution: Le timeout du connecteur a ete ajuste puis les dossiers en attente ont ete reemis dans l ordre de soumission
root_cause: Le timeout reseau de la passerelle etait inferieur au temps de reponse reel du service partenaire
comments_summary: Les dossiers urgents ont ete rejoues en lots restreints avec un suivi manuel des accuses de reception Le timeout du connecteur a ete ajuste puis les dossiers en attente ont ete reemis dans l ordre de soumission Verification finale effectuee avec les equipes metier et exploitation.

title: Indisponibilite de l API Order Care sur la creation de commandes
description: Les appels POST vers l API Order Care retournent HTTP 500 pour toutes les souscriptions depuis 07:45. Les canaux digitaux et le CRM ne peuvent plus creer de nouvelles commandes. Le NOC a ouvert une surveillance renforcee sur le service concerne.
resolution: Le pool de connexions a ete redimensionne puis l application a ete redemarree et les commandes en echec ont ete rejouees
root_cause: Les connexions JDBC expiraient avant renouvellement et ont sature le pool applicatif
comments_summary: Les commandes critiques ont ete prises en charge via un script de creation controle sur la base de secours Le pool de connexions a ete redimensionne puis l application a ete redemarree et les commandes en echec ont ete rejouees Verification finale effectuee avec les equipes metier et exploitation.

title: Echec du lot de migration des comptes clients vers le nouveau referentiel
description: Le lot nocturne de migration de 12500 comptes postpayes s arrete a la phase de transformation et aucun chargement n est effectue dans la cible. Le planning de bascule projet est menace. Le client demande un retour rapide afin de respecter son SLA contractuel.
resolution: La table de mapping a ete completee puis le lot a ete relance depuis le point de reprise et la reconciliation finale a ete validee
root_cause: Une valeur historique de segment client etait absente de la table de correspondance de l ETL
comments_summary: Le lot a ete suspendu et un perimetre reduit de comptes critiques a ete extrait pour verification manuelle La table de mapping a ete completee puis le lot a ete relance depuis le point de reprise et la reconciliation finale a ete validee Verification finale effectuee avec les equipes metier et exploitation.

title: Echec d enregistrement SIP sur le trunk principal entreprise
description: Les appels sortants des clients entreprise ne s etablissent plus depuis 08:15 et le SBC principal retourne 403 sur toutes les tentatives d enregistrement SIP. Le trafic voix sortant est fortement impacte. Des controles complementaires ont ete lances sur les flux inter applicatifs.
resolution: Le certificat a ete renouvele puis redeploye sur le SBC principal et les enregistrements SIP ont repris normalement
root_cause: Le certificat TLS du trunk principal a expire a minuit sans redeploiement automatique
comments_summary: Le trafic voix sortant a ete bascule provisoirement sur le SBC secondaire pour les clients critiques Le certificat a ete renouvele puis redeploye sur le SBC principal et les enregistrements SIP ont repris normalement Verification finale effectuee avec les equipes metier et exploitation.

title: Coupure FTTH regionale apres saturation d un port OLT
description: Plusieurs clients entreprise de la zone Ariana ont perdu la connectivite IP alors que les ONT restent synchronisees optiquement. Aucun trafic ne transite sur le port de collecte principal. Le perimetre touche concerne principalement les comptes B2B prioritaires.
comments_summary: Investigation en cours. Le trafic a ete detourne vers un port de collecte de secours pour les clients prioritaires Une analyse detaillee des journaux applicatifs et des dependances techniques a ete engagee.

title: Perte de connectivite publique sur des instances Cloud VPS apres maintenance
description: Des machines virtuelles de production restent joignables en interne mais ne repondent plus depuis Internet apres une maintenance hyperviseur. Les applications B2B exposees publiquement sont indisponibles. L impact est confirme sur le perimetre production entreprise.
resolution: Les liaisons IP flottantes ont ete reconstruites puis les tables de routage externes ont ete resynchronisees sur le cluster
root_cause: Un agent reseau du cluster n a pas restaure les liaisons des adresses IP flottantes au redemarrage
comments_summary: Un basculement de certains services publics a ete effectue vers le site secondaire du client Les liaisons IP flottantes ont ete reconstruites puis les tables de routage externes ont ete resynchronisees sur le cluster Verification finale effectuee avec les equipes metier et exploitation.

title: Lenteur de consultation des contrats multi lignes dans CRM Ericsson
description: Les agents du centre de relation client constatent des temps d affichage superieurs a 25 secondes lors de l ouverture des contrats multi lignes. La prise d appel sur les comptes entreprise est fortement ralentie. Le NOC a ouvert une surveillance renforcee sur le service concerne.
comments_summary: Investigation en cours. Les agents ont utilise la vue simplifiee client pendant la degradation pour poursuivre les appels Une analyse detaillee des journaux applicatifs et des dependances techniques a ete engagee.

title: Erreur de taxation TVA sur les frais de remise en service BSCS
description: Les devis et previsualisations de facture appliquent un taux de TVA incorrect sur les frais de remise en service des comptes entreprise. L anomalie ne touche pas les comptes grand public. Le client demande un retour rapide afin de respecter son SLA contractuel.
resolution: Le code taxe du produit a ete corrige dans le catalogue BSCS puis les simulations tarifaires ont ete relancees
root_cause: Le produit technique etait rattache a une classe fiscale grand public au lieu de la classe entreprise
comments_summary: Les devis sensibles ont ete verifies manuellement par l equipe billing avant validation client Le code taxe du produit a ete corrige dans le catalogue BSCS puis les simulations tarifaires ont ete relancees Verification finale effectuee avec les equipes metier et exploitation.

title: Fausse alarme critique persistante sur un routeur coeur dans OSS
description: Une alarme de perte de redondance reste ouverte dans l OSS alors que le routeur coeur est revenu nominalement selon l equipe reseau. Les tableaux de disponibilite sont fausses et le NOC multiplie les escalades inutiles. Des controles complementaires ont ete lances sur les flux inter applicatifs.
resolution: La base d etat OSS a ete resynchronisee puis le connecteur d alarme a ete redemarre et les faux positifs ont disparu

title: Echec de provisionnement de l option roaming entreprise
description: Les commandes de souscription a l option roaming sont acceptees dans le CRM mais echouent a l etape de provisionning HLR HSS. Les clients ne peuvent pas utiliser l option a l etranger. Le perimetre touche concerne principalement les comptes B2B prioritaires.

title: Rejets incoherents des demandes MNP pour identite client invalide
description: Plusieurs dossiers de portabilite sont rejetes avec un code identite client invalide alors que les donnees du CRM sont correctes. Le phenomene touche surtout les lignes B2B multi utilisateurs. L impact est confirme sur le perimetre production entreprise.

title: Violation de cles etrangeres pendant la migration des ordres de service
description: Le chargement des ordres de service dans la cible s interrompt avec des erreurs SQL de cle etrangere. Les ordres dependent de referentiels produit et canal absents dans la cible. Le client demande un retour rapide afin de respecter son SLA contractuel.
resolution: Le sequencement ETL a ete corrige puis les referentiels ont ete recharges avant rejeu complet des ordres de service

comments_summary: Le lot d import des ordres a ete suspendu et les ordres critiques ont ete extraits pour un chargement pilote Le sequencement ETL a ete corrige puis les referentiels ont ete recharges avant rejeu complet des ordres de service Verification finale effectuee avec les equipes metier et exploitation.

title: Perte RTP sur les files du centre de contact VoIP
description: Le centre de contact constate des coupures vocales et une forte gigue sur les appels entrants depuis le debut de matinee. Le taux de perte RTP depasse 8 pour cent sur plusieurs files critiques. Des controles complementaires ont ete lances sur les flux inter applicatifs.

root_cause: Une politique QoS appliquee lors d une maintenance avait degrade la priorite du trafic RTP
comments_summary: Les appels prioritaires ont ete reroutes vers la passerelle media secondaire pour reduire l impact La politique QoS a ete corrigee sur les interfaces de sortie et les flux RTP ont retrouve un niveau de perte normal Verification finale effectuee avec les equipes metier et exploitation.

title: Debit FTTH inferieur au profil commercial sur liaison entreprise
description: Le client mesure un debit descendant plafonne a 120 Mbps sur une offre 300 Mbps. Les tests sont realises en filaire et l ONT ne remonte aucune alarme optique. Le perimetre touche concerne principalement les comptes B2B prioritaires.

root_cause: Le profil de traffic shaping applique sur l OLT etait celui d une ancienne offre
comments_summary: Le client a ete place temporairement sur un profil intermediaire plus eleve en attendant la correction definitive Le template de bande passante a ete corrige sur l OLT puis la session client a ete reprovisionnee au bon debit Verification finale effectuee avec les equipes metier et exploitation.

title: Snapshots nocturnes Cloud VPS en echec sur le cluster de sauvegarde
description: Les snapshots planifies de plusieurs VM de production echouent depuis deux nuits consecutives et aucun point de restauration recent n est disponible. Le risque de perte de reprise augmente. L impact est confirme sur le perimetre production entreprise.

comments_summary: Les devis sensibles ont ete verifies manuellement par l equipe billing avant validation client Le code taxe du produit a ete corrige dans le catalogue BSCS puis les simulations tarifaires ont ete relancees Verification finale effectuee avec les equipes metier et exploitation.

title: Enterprise discount not applied on BSCS monthly invoices secondary scope
description: Several enterprise accounts were billed above their contracted amount because the corporate discount rule was not applied during invoice generation. Finance escalated the discrepancy before customer distribution. The impact is confirmed on the enterprise production scope.
resolution: The discount reference was restored in the billing catalog and impacted invoices were regenerated before release
root_cause: An incomplete tariff catalog promotion removed the enterprise discount reference from the active billing configuration
comments_summary: Invoice release was paused for the affected account segment while finance reviewed the impacted customer list The discount reference was restored in the billing catalog and impacted invoices were regenerated before release Final validation was completed with operations and business teams.

title: Order Care webhook payload missing sales channel after release secondary scope
description: Downstream CRM and reporting systems stopped receiving the sales channel attribute in Order Care webhook payloads after a minor release. Reporting by channel became inconsistent for new orders. The operations team opened enhanced monitoring on the affected service.
resolution: The webhook serializer was corrected and missed events were republished with the complete payload schema
root_cause: A serialization change removed the optional salesChannel field from the webhook contract
comments_summary: Reporting teams used the order creation logs as a temporary source for channel attribution during the issue The webhook serializer was corrected and missed events were republished with the complete payload schema Final validation was completed with operations and business teams.

title: BSCS invoice rendering backlog on large enterprise accounts secondary scope
description: Invoice rendering for high volume enterprise accounts exceeded twenty minutes and several invoice previews timed out in the billing portal. Finance users could not validate invoices before the cut off window. The customer requested rapid recovery to protect the contractual SLA.
resolution: The rendering cache configuration was optimized and the blocked preview jobs were reprocessed successfully
root_cause: The rendering service loaded oversized attachment bundles without using the template cache efficiently
comments_summary: A reduced preview template was enabled for urgent finance validation while the rendering path was being corrected The rendering cache configuration was optimized and the blocked preview jobs were reprocessed successfully Final validation was completed with operations and business teams.

title: CRM Ericsson merge workflow failing for duplicate corporate accounts secondary scope
description: Customer care teams could not merge duplicate corporate accounts in CRM Ericsson because the workflow stopped after validation. The duplicate record remained active and case ownership stayed inconsistent. Additional checks were launched on the related integration flows.
resolution: The workflow rules were updated and duplicate corporate records were merged successfully after validation testing
root_cause: The merge workflow did not handle active service contracts linked to multiple billing profiles
comments_summary: Support agents used a manual ownership correction process for urgent duplicate cases during the incident The workflow rules were updated and duplicate corporate records were merged successfully after validation testing Final validation was completed with operations and business teams.

title: Core Network OSS polling failure for transmission backbone nodes secondary scope
description: Backbone transmission nodes stopped reporting availability and latency metrics to Core Network OSS during the morning collection window. NOC dashboards showed the nodes in unknown state. The issue mainly affects priority B2B accounts.
comments_summary: Investigation is ongoing. The NOC relied on direct device polling for the most critical backbone sites until OSS collection was restored Detailed review of application logs and technical dependencies is in progress.

title: Provisioning queue blocked for postpaid package activations secondary scope
description: Postpaid package activation orders remained in accepted state for more than one hour and were not progressing through the provisioning platform. Retail and CRM channels were both affected. The impact is confirmed on the enterprise production scope.
resolution: The malformed payload pattern was quarantined and the main consumer was restarted then all pending activations were replayed
root_cause: A malformed campaign payload blocked the main provisioning consumer thread
comments_summary: A secondary worker pool processed priority activations while the queue was being stabilized The malformed payload pattern was quarantined and the main consumer was restarted then all pending activations were replayed Final validation was completed with operations and business teams.

title: Morning portability cutover batch missed by gateway scheduler secondary scope
description: The 06:00 portability cutover batch did not start and customer numbers remained pending for activation on the target network. The incident created a risk of regulatory SLA breach. The operations team opened enhanced monitoring on the affected service.
resolution: The stale lock was cleared and scheduler health checks were added before replaying the missed batch successfully
root_cause: A stale execution lock prevented the scheduler from releasing the morning cutover trigger
comments_summary: Priority portability cases were executed through a supervised manual cutover sequence while the scheduler was recovered The stale lock was cleared and scheduler health checks were added before replaying the missed batch successfully Final validation was completed with operations and business teams.

title: Order Care callback delivery loss to CRM integration connector secondary scope
description: Completion callbacks were generated by Order Care but a subset of them never reached the CRM connector. Orders appeared completed in Order Care and still in progress in CRM. The customer requested rapid recovery to protect the contractual SLA.
comments_summary: Investigation is ongoing. Back office teams used the Order Care operations console to confirm completion status for urgent customer orders Detailed review of application logs and technical dependencies is in progress.

title: Customer migration batch failed on invalid product mapping rules secondary scope
description: A migration batch moving enterprise customers to the new billing and CRM stack stopped during transformation because several product codes could not be mapped to the target catalog. Additional checks were launched on the related integration flows.
resolution: The missing product mappings were added and the migration batch was replayed from the failed checkpoint without remaining errors
root_cause: Legacy enterprise product codes were missing from the target mapping table
comments_summary: Migration governance accepted a temporary exclusion list for non critical products while the catalog mapping was completed The missing product mappings were added and the migration batch was replayed from the failed checkpoint without remaining errors Final validation was completed with operations and business teams.

title: International call routing failure on enterprise VoIP trunks secondary scope
description: Enterprise customers could place national calls successfully but international calls toward European destinations failed with 503 responses on the VoIP platform. Several contact centers were impacted. The issue mainly affects priority B2B accounts.
resolution: The route pattern was restored on the production SBC nodes and successful international test calls confirmed service recovery
root_cause: A recent route pattern update removed the main international exit trunk from one destination group
comments_summary: Calls to affected destinations were temporarily rerouted through the backup carrier for premium customers The route pattern was restored on the production SBC nodes and successful international test calls confirmed service recovery Final validation was completed with operations and business teams.

title: FTTH enterprise access profile mismatch after service migration secondary scope
description: After a recent migration the enterprise FTTH circuit kept the previous residential shaping template and delivered a lower bandwidth than contracted. Optical quality remained stable during the incident. The impact is confirmed on the enterprise production scope.
resolution: The correct enterprise access template was assigned and the circuit was reprovisioned with the expected bandwidth profile
root_cause: The migration workflow attached the wrong OLT service profile to the enterprise circuit
comments_summary: A temporary bandwidth override was applied on the access node to reduce customer impact before final correction The correct enterprise access template was assigned and the circuit was reprovisioned with the expected bandwidth profile Final validation was completed with operations and business teams.

title: Cloud VPS firewall policy not applied to the management subnet secondary scope
description: A customer approved firewall rule was visible in the cloud portal but was not enforced on the production virtual machine. Management access from the approved subnet failed while other services stayed online. The operations team opened enhanced monitoring on the affected service.
comments_summary: Investigation is ongoing. Operations used console access on the hypervisor to perform urgent administration tasks until the firewall policy was corrected Detailed review of application logs and technical dependencies is in progress.

title: Enterprise discount not applied on BSCS monthly invoices secondary scope
description: Several enterprise accounts were billed above their contracted amount because the corporate discount rule was not applied during invoice generation. Finance escalated the discrepancy before customer distribution. The customer requested rapid recovery to protect the contractual SLA.
comments_summary: Investigation is ongoing. Invoice release was paused for the affected account segment while finance reviewed the impacted customer list Detailed review of application logs and technical dependencies is in progress.

title: Order Care webhook payload missing sales channel after release secondary scope
description: Downstream CRM and reporting systems stopped receiving the sales channel attribute in Order Care webhook payloads after a minor release. Reporting by channel became inconsistent for new orders. Additional checks were launched on the related integration flows.
resolution: The webhook serializer was corrected and missed events were republished with the complete payload schema
root_cause: A serialization change removed the optional salesChannel field from the webhook contract
comments_summary: Reporting teams used the order creation logs as a temporary source for channel attribution during the issue The webhook serializer was corrected and missed events were republished with the complete payload schema Final validation was completed with operations and business teams.

title: BSCS invoice rendering backlog on large enterprise accounts secondary scope
description: Invoice rendering for high volume enterprise accounts exceeded twenty minutes and several invoice previews timed out in the billing portal. Finance users could not validate invoices before the cut off window. The issue mainly affects priority B2B accounts.
resolution: The rendering cache configuration was optimized and the blocked preview jobs were reprocessed successfully
root_cause: The rendering service loaded oversized attachment bundles without using the template cache efficiently
comments_summary: A reduced preview template was enabled for urgent finance validation while the rendering path was being corrected The rendering cache configuration was optimized and the blocked preview jobs were reprocessed successfully Final validation was completed with operations and business teams.

title: CRM Ericsson merge workflow failing for duplicate corporate accounts secondary scope
description: Customer care teams could not merge duplicate corporate accounts in CRM Ericsson because the workflow stopped after validation. The duplicate record remained active and case ownership stayed inconsistent. The impact is confirmed on the enterprise production scope.
resolution: The workflow rules were updated and duplicate corporate records were merged successfully after validation testing
root_cause: The merge workflow did not handle active service contracts linked to multiple billing profiles
comments_summary: Support agents used a manual ownership correction process for urgent duplicate cases during the incident The workflow rules were updated and duplicate corporate records were merged successfully after validation testing Final validation was completed with operations and business teams.

title: Core Network OSS polling failure for transmission backbone nodes secondary scope
description: Backbone transmission nodes stopped reporting availability and latency metrics to Core Network OSS during the morning collection window. NOC dashboards showed the nodes in unknown state. The operations team opened enhanced monitoring on the affected service.
comments_summary: Investigation is ongoing. The NOC relied on direct device polling for the most critical backbone sites until OSS collection was restored Detailed review of application logs and technical dependencies is in progress.

title: Provisioning queue blocked for postpaid package activations secondary scope
description: Postpaid package activation orders remained in accepted state for more than one hour and were not progressing through the provisioning platform. Retail and CRM channels were both affected. The customer requested rapid recovery to protect the contractual SLA.
resolution: The malformed payload pattern was quarantined and the main consumer was restarted then all pending activations were replayed
root_cause: A malformed campaign payload blocked the main provisioning consumer thread
comments_summary: A secondary worker pool processed priority activations while the queue was being stabilized The malformed payload pattern was quarantined and the main consumer was restarted then all pending activations were replayed Final validation was completed with operations and business teams.

title: Morning portability cutover batch missed by gateway scheduler secondary scope
description: The 06:00 portability cutover batch did not start and customer numbers remained pending for activation on the target network. The incident created a risk of regulatory SLA breach. Additional checks were launched on the related integration flows.
resolution: The stale lock was cleared and scheduler health checks were added before replaying the missed batch successfully
root_cause: A stale execution lock prevented the scheduler from releasing the morning cutover trigger
comments_summary: Priority portability cases were executed through a supervised manual cutover sequence while the scheduler was recovered The stale lock was cleared and scheduler health checks were added before replaying the missed batch successfully Final validation was completed with operations and business teams.

title: Order Care callback delivery loss to CRM integration connector secondary scope
description: Completion callbacks were generated by Order Care but a subset of them never reached the CRM connector. Orders appeared completed in Order Care and still in progress in CRM. The issue mainly affects priority B2B accounts.
comments_summary: Investigation is ongoing. Back office teams used the Order Care operations console to confirm completion status for urgent customer orders Detailed review of application logs and technical dependencies is in progress.

title: Customer migration batch failed on invalid product mapping rules secondary scope
description: A migration batch moving enterprise customers to the new billing and CRM stack stopped during transformation because several product codes could not be mapped to the target catalog. The impact is confirmed on the enterprise production scope.
resolution: The missing product mappings were added and the migration batch was replayed from the failed checkpoint without remaining errors
root_cause: Legacy enterprise product codes were missing from the target mapping table
comments_summary: Migration governance accepted a temporary exclusion list for non critical products while the catalog mapping was completed The missing product mappings were added and the migration batch was replayed from the failed checkpoint without remaining errors Final validation was completed with operations and business teams.

title: International call routing failure on enterprise VoIP trunks secondary scope
description: Enterprise customers could place national calls successfully but international calls toward European destinations failed with 503 responses on the VoIP platform. Several contact centers were impacted. The operations team opened enhanced monitoring on the affected service.
resolution: The route pattern was restored on the production SBC nodes and successful international test calls confirmed service recovery
root_cause: A recent route pattern update removed the main international exit trunk from one destination group
comments_summary: Calls to affected destinations were temporarily rerouted through the backup carrier for premium customers The route pattern was restored on the production SBC nodes and successful international test calls confirmed service recovery Final validation was completed with operations and business teams.
